name: deorbit-land
description: From orbit, exit the coast, descend through the atmosphere (SN-BRAKE caps the fall), drop dev-nav and land on the surface — assert landed (on_ground + planetary).
_notes: Precondition: in orbit / coasting (run ascent-to-orbit + o-coast-hold first). A second nav:orbit toggles the coast OFF; vertical-down thrust lowers the craft; below 384 the nav machine returns to PLANETARY and SN_ATMO_BRAKING caps the descent speed. dev_nav:false re-enables the capsule so the player stands. Tune the descent seconds from the streamed alt.

legs.name: land — drop dev-nav to the surface
